open.description: Whether the action sheet is visible.

onClose.description: Called when the sheet should close (backdrop tap, Escape, cancel, or after a selection).

title.description: Optional short title rendered at the top of the actions group.

message.description: Optional supporting message rendered under the title.

actions.description: Action items. Each item: { key?, label, description?, icon?, disabled?, destructive?, onSelect? }.

showCancel.description: Show the standalone cancel button below the actions group.

onCancel.description: Called when the cancel button is tapped, before onClose.

variant.description: Visual variant. 'ios' centers items in a rounded card with a separate cancel pill; 'material' is a flush bottom sheet with left-aligned items; 'plain' merges actions and cancel into one card.

closeOnSelect.description: Auto-close after an action is selected.

safeArea.description: Apply env(safe-area-inset-bottom) so the sheet clears the iOS home indicator.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the sheet root.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the dialog. Defaults to the title text if it's a string.
